summary: Ad Winning Engine Testing Complete: All 23 backend tests passed, all frontend components verified on product detail page
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ad-engine/patterns/{product_id} returns 200 for valid product
Backend: Patterns response contains product_id, patterns, platforms, total_ads_analyzed, overall_confidence, overall_confidence_level
Backend: Patterns hook_type has primary/secondary with name, description, pattern_frequency, pattern_strength, confidence_score, confidence_level
Backend: Patterns video_length has dominant_range, platform, best_for
Backend: Patterns content_format has ugc_ratio, studio_ratio, dominant (UGC + Studio = 100%)
Backend: Patterns cta_style has name, example, pattern_strength
Backend: Patterns music_sound has dominant_type
Backend: Patterns engagement_indicators has avg_engagement_rate, comment_sentiment, save_rate
Backend: GET /api/ad-engine/patterns/{product_id} returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: GET /api/ad-engine/blueprint/{product_id} returns 200 for valid product
Backend: Blueprint response contains product_id, scenes, hook_variations, filming_tips, target_platforms, optimal_length, content_style
Backend: Blueprint has exactly 5 scenes (Hook, Product Introduction, Demonstration, Result/Transformation, CTA)
Backend: Blueprint scenes have scene, timing, visual, text_overlay, audio, purpose fields
Backend: Blueprint has exactly 3 hook variations with hook_type, opening_line, effectiveness
Backend: Blueprint has exactly 5 filming tips
Backend: GET /api/ad-engine/blueprint/{product_id} returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: GET /api/ad-engine/performance/{product_id} returns 200 for valid product
Backend: Performance response contains engagement_level, engagement_description, activity_trend, trend_icon, ad_saturation, saturation_advice, ads_detected, ads_discovered, platforms_active
Backend: Performance engagement_level is valid value (Very High/High/Medium/Low/None)
Backend: Performance activity_trend is valid value (Rapidly Growing/Growing/Stable/Declining)
Backend: Performance trend_icon is valid value (rocket/trending-up/trending-down/minus)
Backend: Performance ad_saturation is valid value (High/Medium/Low)
Backend: GET /api/ad-engine/performance/{product_id} returns 404 for non-existent product
Frontend: WinningAdPatterns component (data-testid='winning-ad-patterns') present on product detail page
Frontend: WinningAdPatterns has gradient header with 75% confidence badge
Frontend: WinningAdPatterns has 3 tabs (Patterns, Engagement, Platforms)

Frontend: WinningAdPatterns Patterns tab shows Hook Type (Transformation), Alt Hook (Social Proof), Video Length (7-12s), Content Format (UGC 74%), CTA Style (Direct), Music/Sound (Trending TikTok sound)
Frontend: AdBlueprint component (data-testid='ad-blueprint') present on product detail page
Frontend: AdBlueprint has gradient header showing 7-12s UGC style
Frontend: AdBlueprint shows 5 scene cards (data-testid='scene-0' through 'scene-4')
Frontend: AdBlueprint scenes show: Hook (0-2s), Product Introduction (2-4s), Demonstration (4-7s), Result/Transformation (7-9s), CTA (9-11s)
Frontend: AdBlueprint hook variations section (data-testid='hook-variations') shows 3 alternatives (Question, Shock/Curiosity, Social Proof)
Frontend: AdBlueprint filming tips section (data-testid='filming-tips') shows 5 tips
Frontend: AdPerformanceIndicator component (data-testid='ad-performance') present on product detail page
Frontend: AdPerformanceIndicator shows engagement level badge (data-testid='engagement-level') with 'Low' value
Frontend: AdPerformanceIndicator shows activity trend (data-testid='activity-trend') with 'Stable' value
Frontend: AdPerformanceIndicator shows ad saturation badge (data-testid='ad-saturation') with 'Low' value
Frontend: AdPerformanceIndicator shows saturation advice text
Frontend: AdPerformanceIndicator shows Platforms Active (Tiktok, Meta, Google Shopping)
Frontend: AdCreativeSection shows 'Generated using winning ad patterns' indicator text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad Winning Engine feature fully verified. Three new PUBLIC API endpoints: GET /api/ad-engine/patterns/{id}, GET /api/ad-engine/blueprint/{id}, GET /api/ad-engine/performance/{id}. All return 404 for non-existent products. Three new frontend components on product detail page: WinningAdPatterns (gradient header, 3 tabs, confidence badges), AdBlueprint (5 scene timeline, 3 hook variations, 5 filming tips), AdPerformanceIndicator (engagement level, activity trend, ad saturation). AdCreativeSection updated with 'Generated using winning ad patterns' indicator. All components load without errors.

backend_endpoints.patterns: GET /api/ad-engine/patterns/{product_id} - Returns hook_type (primary/secondary), video_length, content_format, cta_style, music_sound, engagement_indicators, platforms, overall_confidence
backend_endpoints.blueprint: GET /api/ad-engine/blueprint/{product_id} - Returns 5 scenes (Hook, Product Introduction, Demonstration, Result/Transformation, CTA), 3 hook_variations, 5 filming_tips, target_platforms, optimal_length
backend_endpoints.performance: GET /api/ad-engine/performance/{product_id} - Returns engagement_level, engagement_description, activity_trend, trend_icon, ad_saturation, saturation_advice, ads_detected, platforms_active

features: 'Generated using winning ad patterns' indicator text visible

Ad_Winning_Engine.note: Patterns are deterministic based on product data - not mocked

console_warnings: Mixed Content warning for notifications API - minor issue not related to Ad Winning Engine
